rule: No asset-class read can graduate into Macro unless its source family, dataset status, freshness rule, and confidence label are declared.
marketPriceProviderRule: Mission 4 may use the safest available free provider only after it is explicitly selected and documented. Until then, market_price_provider remains a required dependency, not a hidden assumption.

fred.name: FRED / St. Louis Fed
fred.role: Official and institutional macro time series backbone for yields, rates, money, reserves, spreads, inflation, financial conditions, and selected volatility data.

federal_reserve.name: Federal Reserve
federal_reserve.role: Policy rates, balance sheet, reserves, financial conditions, lending standards, and banking-system data.

bls.name: Bureau of Labor Statistics
bls.role: Inflation, labor, producer prices, and construction cost context where available.

bea.name: Bureau of Economic Analysis
bea.role: GDP, income, profits, and macro growth context where needed.

eia.name: U.S. Energy Information Administration
eia.role: Oil, natural gas, energy inventories, supply, and energy-system stress.

treasury_fiscaldata.name: U.S. Treasury FiscalData
treasury_fiscaldata.role: Treasury cash balance, debt issuance, and federal fiscal/liquidity context where endpoint support is validated.

sec_edgar.name: SEC EDGAR APIs
sec_edgar.role: Company facts, filings, fundamentals, revenue, margins, capex, and ticker-level financial statement data.

cftc_cot.name: CFTC Commitments of Traders
cftc_cot.role: Futures positioning context for commodities, rates, FX, metals, and energy.

fhfa_case_shiller.name: FHFA / Case-Shiller Housing Data
fhfa_case_shiller.role: Property price and housing-cycle context for real assets.

market_price_provider.name: Market Price Provider
market_price_provider.role: ETF, index, commodity, FX, precious metal, crypto, sector, and basket price data.

crypto_liquidity_provider.name: Crypto Liquidity Provider
crypto_liquidity_provider.role: Bitcoin, stablecoin supply, crypto liquidity, and crypto-risk correlation data.

etf_index_holdings_provider.name: ETF / Index Holdings Provider
etf_index_holdings_provider.role: Index concentration, leader weights, sector weights, and basket construction.

manual_research.name: Manual Research Layer
manual_research.role: Temporary declared manual layer for datasets not yet available through a free or stable automated source.

derived.name: Derived Calculation
derived.role: Series calculated from declared source datasets, such as real cash yield, curves, momentum, spreads, correlations, and risk premia.

freshnessDefaults.crypto_liquidity_provider: 1 trading day unless source frequency is lower
freshnessDefaults.fred: 7 calendar days unless source frequency is lower
freshnessDefaults.federal_reserve: 7 calendar days unless source frequency is lower
freshnessDefaults.eia: 7 calendar days unless source frequency is lower
freshnessDefaults.treasury_fiscaldata: 7 calendar days unless source frequency is lower
freshnessDefaults.etf_index_holdings_provider: 30 calendar days unless source is live
freshnessDefaults.manual_research: 30 calendar days with visible stale warning
freshnessDefaults.derived: inherits strictest freshness of input datasets
